new_claims.claim_text: Iran is shooting at US aircraft conducting a rescue mission, turning it into a combat operation.
new_claims.notes: Claim of combat operation due to Iran firing on US rescue aircraft.

new_claims.claim_text: The Iranian Revolutionary Guards (IRGC) announced the downing of an American F-15 fighter jet on Qeshm Island.
new_claims.notes: Claim refuted by @Kanthan2030 as a fake video: https://facebook.com/share/r/18AhFgJjov/?mibextid=wwXIfr
